name: Lebkuchen (Spice Bars)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the spices, salt, flour, and baking powder.
2. Add the almonds and lemon rind to the dry ingredients.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and sugar until a ribbon forms when the beater is removed.
4. Gradually stir in the honey and milk.
5. Stir in the flour mixture; beat until smooth.
6. Grease and flour an 11 X 17-inch jelly roll pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 400 degrees F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
10. To make the almond glaze, mix confectioners' sugar, almond extract, rum, and water in a bowl until smooth.
11. Spread the warm cake with the glaze while still warm.
12. Cut the cake into 1 X 2 1/2-inch bars.
13. Store in a sealed container for up to 6-8 weeks.
